example: Elle s'épanouit dans son nouveau travail.
example_translation: She is flourishing in her new job.

translation: to be wary of / to distrust
example: Méfie-toi des offres trop belles pour être vraies.
example_translation: Be wary of offers that are too good to be true.

translation: to manage to / to succeed in
example: Il est parvenu à terminer le projet à temps.
example_translation: He managed to finish the project on time.

example: Il prétend tout savoir sur le sujet.
example_translation: He claims to know everything about the subject.

translation: to realize / to become aware of
example: Je me suis rendu compte de mon erreur trop tard.
example_translation: I realized my mistake too late.

example: J'envisage de déménager en France l'année prochaine.
example_translation: I am considering moving to France next year.

example: Ses amis l'ont soutenu dans cette épreuve.
example_translation: His friends supported him through this ordeal.

example: Comment est-ce qu'il faut s'y prendre ?
example_translation: How should one go about it?

example: Il se plaint tout le temps du mauvais temps.
example_translation: He complains all the time about the bad weather.

translation: to lead to / to result in
example: Les négociations ont abouti à un accord.
example_translation: The negotiations resulted in an agreement.

example: Je ne m'attendais pas à ce résultat.
example_translation: I wasn't expecting this result.

translation: to resume / to take back / to correct
example: Le professeur l'a repris sur sa prononciation.
example_translation: The teacher corrected him on his pronunciation.

example: Elle a fait preuve de beaucoup de courage.
example_translation: She showed a lot of courage.

example: Il faut tenir compte des contraintes budgétaires.
example_translation: We must take budget constraints into account.

translation: to suspect / to have an inkling
example: Je me doutais que quelque chose n'allait pas.
example_translation: I suspected that something was wrong.

example: Tu te souviens de notre premier voyage ?
example_translation: Do you remember our first trip?

example: Il n'ose pas lui dire la vérité.
example_translation: He doesn't dare tell her the truth.

example: Ils ont franchi une nouvelle étape dans leur relation.
example_translation: They crossed a new milestone in their relationship.

translation: to be quiet / to shut up
example: Tais-toi ! Tu fais trop de bruit.
example_translation: Be quiet! You're making too much noise.

translation: to highlight / to enhance / to showcase
example: Cette robe met ta silhouette en valeur.
example_translation: This dress showcases your figure.
